allow:
Bash(/tmp/test_multiline.prologos << 'EOF'
defn sym {A} [a :0 : A, b :0 : A, prf : \(Eq A a b\)] : \(Eq A b a\)
  \(J a b prf\)
EOF)

Bash(/tmp/test_data_simple.prologos << 'EOF'
data Ordering
  lt-ord
  eq-ord
  gt-ord
EOF)

Bash(/tmp/test-light-only.rkt << 'RACKET_EOF'
#lang racket/base
\(require rackunit racket/list racket/path racket/string racket/port racket/file
         "../macros.rkt" "../prelude.rkt" "../syntax.rkt" "../source-location.rkt"
         "../surface-syntax.rkt" "../errors.rkt" "../metavar-store.rkt" "../parser.rkt"
         "../elaborator.rkt" "../pretty-print.rkt" "../global-env.rkt" "../driver.rkt"
         "../reduction.rkt" \(prefix-in tc: "../typing-core.rkt"\) "../namespace.rkt"
         "../trait-resolution.rkt" "../reader.rkt"\)

\(define here \(path->string \(path-only \(syntax-source #'here\)\)\)\)
\(define lib-dir \(simplify-path \(build-path here ".." "lib"\)\)\)

;; Fresh env \(no shared fixture\)
\(define \(run s\)
  \(parameterize \([current-global-env \(hasheq\)]
                 [current-ns-context #f]
                 [current-module-registry \(hasheq\)]
                 [current-lib-paths \(list lib-dir\)]
                 [current-mult-meta-store \(make-hasheq\)]
                 [current-preparse-registry \(current-preparse-registry\)]
                 [current-trait-registry \(current-trait-registry\)]
                 [current-impl-registry \(current-impl-registry\)]
                 [current-param-impl-registry \(current-param-impl-registry\)]
                 [current-bundle-registry \(current-bundle-registry\)]\)
    \(install-module-loader!\)
    \(process-string s\)\)\)
\(define \(run-last s\) \(last \(run s\)\)\)

\(test-case "light: zero |> suc → 1"
  \(check-equal? \(run-last "\(eval \($pipe-gt zero suc\)\)"\) "1N : Nat"\)\)
RACKET_EOF)
